steps.name: design-language-and-tokens-v2
steps.summary: UI_GUIDE v2 전면 개정(정보밀도·모듈별 컬러·마이크로 인터랙션·다크 우선) + tokens.css v2(모듈 컬러 5종·elevation·motion·spacing·tabular-nums, light/dark 전체 매핑) + base.css(tabular-nums·prefers-reduced-motion) + module-color.ts 헬퍼·단위테스트. type-check·lint·build·test(168) PASS.

steps.name: dark-mode-and-theme-switcher
steps.summary: useThemeStore(light/dark/system + localStorage 'itg.theme' 영구화 + prefers-color-scheme 감지, SSR/node 가드) + ThemeToggle.vue(TopBar 우측 3버튼 segmented) + main.ts 부팅 시 apply()로 FOUC 회피 + useThemeStore.spec(5 tests). type-check·lint·build·test(173) PASS, dev 200.

steps.name: charts-and-kpi-components
steps.summary: ECharts 6 + vue-echarts 8 도입(lib/echarts.ts tree-shaking 등록, main.ts 부팅 import) + chart-theme.ts(토큰→getComputedStyle 색 읽기, useChartColors 다크 watch, 순수 옵션 빌더 build{Line,Bar,Donut,Sparkline}Option·trendInfo·moduleChartColor) + dataviz 7종(KpiCard·Sparkline·TrendIndicator·DonutChart·BarChart·LineChart·MetricRow, 토큰·모듈컬러·다크 자동) + /_dev/charts 갤러리 + chart-theme.spec(15 tests). type-check·lint·build·test(188) PASS.
